title: S + must have + p.p.（對過去的推測）

formulas.zh: 主詞必定已經…（對過去強烈肯定的推測）

formulas.formula: S + may/might have + p.p. / S + can't have + p.p.
formulas.zh: 主詞可能已經…／主詞不可能已經…（過去推測的其他表達）

explanation: must have + 過去分詞用於對過去事實的強烈肯定推測，表示說話者對某事幾乎確定。此句型強度介於一般過去式的陳述與推測之間。may/might have表示可能性較低的推測；can't have則表否定推測，語氣強烈。三者均涉及對過去情況的態度判斷，而非事實敘述。常見混淆點：confuse with「must + V」（現在義務）；must have強調過去推測基礎。

examples.eng: She must have studied hard before the exam because she got an A.
examples.chi: 她考試前一定很認真讀書，因為她考了A。

examples.eng: He didn't answer the phone; he must have been sleeping when I called.
examples.chi: 他沒接電話；我打電話時他一定在睡覺。

examples.eng: The accident might have happened during rush hour, but we're not sure.
examples.chi: 車禍可能在尖峰時間發生，但我們不確定。

examples.eng: You can't have forgotten the meeting; it was yesterday at 3 p.m.
examples.chi: 你不可能忘記昨天下午三點的會議。

extension.tip: 判斷推測強度：must have最強（95%肯定）→ may/might have較弱（50%可能）→ can't have為完全否定。注意與「should have / could have」的區別：前兩者是過去未實現的遺憾，不純粹推測。時間詞（ago, yesterday, last week）常與此句型搭配。

examples.test: She didn't come to the party last night.
examples.result: → She must have been busy.（她一定很忙）VS. She might have forgotten.（她可能忘了）

examples.test: He scored perfectly on the test.
examples.result: → He must have studied very carefully.（他一定很認真讀書）VS. ✗ He must study carefully.（錯：無法表達推測）

examples.test: Nobody saw him at the meeting.
examples.result: → He can't have attended.（他不可能出席）vs. He might not have attended.（他可能沒出席）

extension.note: 記憶口訣：「must最強，may最弱，can't否定」；推測過去用完成式（have + p.p.），推測現在用簡單式（must be）。

exercises.sentence: The window is broken. Someone must have broken it during the night.
exercises.translation: 窗戶破了。一定是有人在晚上把它打破的。

parts: He didn't answer his phone yesterday. He
exercises.sentence: He didn't answer his phone yesterday. He might have been busy or could have forgotten it.
exercises.translation: 他昨天沒接電話。他可能很忙，或者可能忘了帶手機。

parts: because nobody was on the road at that time.
exercises.sentence: The accident can't have happened because nobody was on the road at that time.
exercises.translation: 事故不可能發生，因為那時沒有人在路上。

parts: She got the job offer! She
exercises.sentence: She got the job offer! She must have performed very well in the interview.
exercises.translation: 她收到了工作錄取通知！她一定在面試中表現得很好。

vocab_table.zh: 必定已經（強烈肯定推測）
可能已經（低確定度推測）
不可能已經（同can't have，較正式）
本可能已經（過去能力或可能性）
本應該已經（後悔或未實現之事）
可能地（與must have同義強化）
肯定地（肯定推測的強調）

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據情境選擇正確的推測句型，表達對過去事實的強烈肯定推測。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The game was cancelled yesterday. It _______ because of the heavy rain.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。句子表達對過去事實的強烈推測（因為下雨多半導致取消），應使用『must have + p.p.』結構。B項『must be』表現在義務或推測，文法錯誤；C項過於冗贅且語意重複；D項『must cancel』缺少助動詞，不符合推測句型。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇合適的推測動詞片語，表達對過去情況的不同推測程度。
mc_exercises.question_eng: Tom didn't show up at the meeting. He _______ about the time change.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B。根據情境（Tom缺席），說話者對其遺忘的推測程度中等，應用『might have + p.p.』表示可能性較低的推測。A項『must have』表示強烈確定，不符合內文的不確定語氣；C項『can't have』表強烈否定推測，與語意不符；D項『may forget』為現在式推測，時態錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據上下文判斷正確的過去推測句型，區分強肯定與強否定。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The witness said she saw the suspect at midnight. The suspect _______ at that time, so he couldn't be the criminal.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B。後半句『so he couldn't be the criminal』提示用強烈否定推測，應使用『can't have + p.p.』表達說話者對過去的強烈否定。A項『must have been』為肯定推測，與邏輯矛盾；C項『may have been』表可能性，語氣過弱；D項『might be』為現在推測，時態與語意都不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 綜合判斷複雜情境下的過去推測，區分推測強度與時態轉換。
mc_exercises.question_eng: Sarah's car was found abandoned near the beach. She _______ an accident, or she _______ to escape from something dangerous.

options.text: must have had; might have been trying
must be having; might have tried
could have; may have been trying

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。第一空『must have had』表強烈推測她發生車禍（過去發生的事件），用『must have + p.p.』；第二空『might have been trying』表較弱的推測她當時在逃離危險（過去進行的動作），用『might have + 現在分詞』。B項第二空用現在式錯誤；C項第一空『must be having』為現在推測不符；D項『could have』表可能性但不如『must have』確定，第一空語氣不當。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 昨天李明沒來學校，他一定生病了。
translation_exercises.answer: Liming must have been sick yesterday since he didn't come to school.
key_points: 表示對過去的強烈推測
hints: 提示1：使用 must have + p.p. 結構表達對過去事實的幾乎確定的推測
提示2：避免誤用 must be sick（現在義務或狀態），要用 must have been 表示昨天的推測

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 考試時間那麼長，她一定有好好準備。
translation_exercises.answer: She must have prepared well for the exam, considering how much time she spent on it.
hints: 提示1：must have + p.p. 用於根據現有證據推測過去已發生的事實
提示2：不能用 must prepare（現在式），因為句子涉及已經過去的準備行為

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他考試失利，可能沒有認真複習；或者他根本不可能是故意作弊的，他不是那樣的人。
translation_exercises.answer: He might have not studied hard for the exam, or he can't have cheated on purpose because he's not that kind of person.
key_points: 兩種不同推測強度的對比
hints: 提示1：might/may have 表示較低確定性的推測；can't have 表示強烈否定推測，語氣最強
提示2：注意 might have not/might not have 兩種否定形式皆可接受，但 can't have 已含否定意義，不再加 not

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 那場大雨後馬路被淹沒了，之前一定下了好幾個小時；但操場上沒有積水，可能雨水已經流走了，或者那裡根本不可能下那麼大的雨。
translation_exercises.answer: It must have rained for several hours before the street was flooded. However, there was no water on the playground; the rainwater might have drained away, or it can't have rained that heavily there.
hints: 提示1：must have 用於基於明顯跡象的確定推測；might/may have 用於基於部分證據的可能推測；can't have 用於邏輯上否定某事發生
提示2：常見錯誤是用 must rain（現在式）或 must have been raining（進行式）；本題應直接用簡單過去分詞表達已完成的狀態
